arts.ttl: Paul Pogba's former team-mate gives blunt verdict on midfielder returning to Man Utd
arts.sum: Paul Pogba can join a new club next month and start playing in March after a doping ban, but an ex-team-mate has ruled him out of a return to Manchester United for a third spell

arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Viktoria Plzen host Manchester United this evening in Europe, with the Europa League approaching the business end of the league phase. The Red Devils are unbeaten in continental action this campaign but still sit one point outside of the automatic Round of 16 places. arts.ttl: Report: The huge eight-figure fee Man United are set to demand for Marcus Rashford if they sell him in 2025
Jadon Sancho comments on Premier League title race and reveals dressing room chat
arts.sum: Chelsea look to now be in the hunt for the Premier League title this season and Jadon Sancho has opened up on how Enzo Maresca's squad are handling the pressure

arts.ttl: “Can’t talk much” – Player responds to Manchester United transfer claims, brother hopeful move materialises
arts.sum: On Wednesday, we covered several claims from South America discussing Manchester United’s interest in Cerro Porteño’s Diego León. Later that day, Paraguayan journalist Pedro Torres stated the Red Devils have agreed a deal with Cerro Porteño to sign the 17-year-old. Another journalist Roberto Rojas said the left-back will officially join Manchester United in June 2025. The post “Can’t talk much” – Player responds to Manchester United transfer claims, brother hopeful move materialises appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Why Nuno is “perfect for Forest” and Old Trafford win shows “everybody’s up for sale” at Man United
arts.sum: For the first time in almost 30 years, Nottingham Forest won at Old Trafford, and not only did their performance once again show that Nuno Espirito Santo is the right man for the job at the City Ground, but it also highlighted the incredible amount of work that Ruben Amorim is going to have to […] The post Exclusive: Why Nuno is “perfect for Forest” and Old Trafford win shows “everybody’s up for sale” at Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: FIVE names Man Utd want to replace Rashford with
arts.sum: Manchester United have drawn up a list of five names they wish to replace Marcus Rashford with, according to reports. “There is so much to improve,” Amorim admitted when asked about Rashford after Man Utd's win against Everton.
